message:
🌱 Extract 14 magic-number timeouts to named constants (#10616)

Replace inline numeric literals with descriptive named constants
across 5 card components, per codebase rule 'no magic numbers'.

Files changed:
- UpgradeStatus.tsx: WS_READY_CHECK_INTERVAL_MS, VERSION_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS
- StockMarketTicker.tsx: SEARCH_DEBOUNCE_MS
- CardWrapper.tsx: COLLAPSE_DELAY_MS
- MatchGame.tsx: TIMER_TICK_MS, MATCH_REVEAL_DELAY_MS,
  NO_MATCH_FLIP_DELAY_MS, CONFETTI_DURATION_MS
- Checkers.tsx: INITIAL_TAUNT_DELAY_MS, TAUNT_CYCLE_INTERVAL_MS,
  AI_MOVE_DELAY_MS, COMBAT_ANIMATION_MS

Pure refactor — no logic changes. All pre-existing lint errors
remain unchanged (verified against main).

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
